title: Highly Detailed Photorealistic Portrait Beautiful Young Woman
sourceTitle: Highly Detailed Photorealistic Portrait Beautiful Young Woman
prompt: A highly detailed photorealistic portrait of a beautiful young woman with fair skin, long voluminous wavy reddish-orange hair flowing over her shoulders and back, bright expressive eyes, and a warm friendly smile showing her teeth, seated on a glossy tiled floor indoors. She is wearing a bright yellow short-sleeved cropped sports jersey top with blue trim along the V-neckline, sleeves, and shoulders, featuring a circular blue and gold club crest with a crown emblem on the chest. She pairs it with a matching yellow mini skirt with blue side stripes and the same circular crest on the thigh area. A delicate gold chain with small beads rests around her waist, complemented by a thin gold necklace with a small pendant, and black-and-gold bangles on both wrists. Her posture is elegant as she sits with legs tucked beneath her, one hand resting on the floor for support and the other lightly placed beside her, in a clean modern room with white walls, a wooden door visible on the left, and soft indoor lighting creating a polished, vibrant atmosphere. High resolution, sharp details, natural skin texture, cinematic composition.
